inputs.text:
### Reference Sheet Description
**Far Left Panel (Character - Close-up):** A cute stylized Korean grasshopper-themed AI creator mascot character. He has a warm youthful face, large expressive green eyes, short tousled green hair, and two soft antenna-like hair details rising from the top of his head. He wears a green hoodie with lime drawstrings, a small bright grasshopper emblem on the chest, and black techwear-style straps with buckles across his shoulders and chest. His expression is friendly, confident, and playful.

**Second Panel (Character - Full Body Front View):** The same grasshopper-themed AI creator mascot is shown in a full-body front view. He wears a green hoodie, black utility harness straps, small black utility pouches with green accents, dark cargo jogger pants with lime zipper details, and chunky green-black-white sneakers. His posture is relaxed and confident, with a clean readable silhouette.

**Third Panel (Character - Three-Quarter Side View):** The same character is shown in a three-quarter side pose. His green hair, antenna-like details, hoodie, techwear straps, backpack-like utility gear, dark cargo pants, pouches, and sneakers are clearly visible. The pose shows his side silhouette and outfit structure while keeping the same cute, confident identity.

**Fourth Panel (Setting - AI Production Studio):** A cozy modern AI video production studio. The room has a desk with multiple monitors, editing interfaces, green ambient lights, warm wooden shelves, plants, a green-and-black ergonomic chair, glowing green hexagonal wall lights, speakers, a microphone arm, a dark PC tower, and a rug with a green grasshopper-like emblem. The atmosphere is warm, creative, high-tech, and green-themed.

**Far Right Panel (Props - Creator Tools and Tokens):** A collection of isolated AI creator props. There are glowing green token coins with a grasshopper emblem, a compact black keyboard with green lighting, a drawing tablet with a stylus and green grasshopper graphic, a monitor showing a green holographic grasshopper-like interface, and floating AI workflow UI panels. The props are clean, futuristic, and connected to AI video creation.
### Target Description
A clean stylized 3D animation scene takes place inside the cozy green-lit AI production studio. The cute Korean grasshopper-themed AI creator mascot sits at the desk in front of multiple monitors, wearing his green hoodie, black techwear straps, dark cargo pants, utility pouches, and chunky green-black-white sneakers. His short green hair and two soft antenna-like hair details remain consistent with the reference sheet.

The character studies the AI workflow on the monitors with focused concentration. Green UI panels glow softly on the screens, and several small token coins shimmer near the desk. He types quickly on the keyboard, then pauses, leans closer to inspect the video timeline, and nods with satisfaction. His expression shifts from focused concentration to playful confidence.

The camera begins with a medium shot from behind the desk, then slowly pushes in and orbits slightly around him, revealing the warm wooden shelves, green hexagonal wall lights, plants, monitors, drawing tablet, and cozy creator workspace. The lighting is warm and cinematic, with green tech accents reflecting softly on his face and hoodie.

He turns toward the camera, smiles proudly, raises one hand as if directing an invisible AI team, and says with an excited but calm voice: "Alright, let's make this scene come alive."

A few glowing green workflow panels float subtly around the monitors. The motion is smooth, natural, and animation-friendly. The character identity, face, antenna-like hair details, green hoodie, black straps, utility pouches, and studio environment remain consistent throughout the video. The style is polished stylized 3D animation, cute mascot character design, warm cinematic studio lighting, clean composition, high quality, stable motion, no extra characters, no text overlays, no subtitles, no watermark.
pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly
